case_title: DISCOVER BANK VS. ERIC JOHANSEN et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK FKA GREENWOOD TRUST COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOHANSSON, ERIC AN INDIVIDUAL $4,632.17 PRINCIPAL, $367.93 ATTORNEY FEES, $304.92 INTEREST, $149.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,454.02, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-16-2002 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE SEP-06-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
